actorId.label: ✨Mass Linkedin Profile Scraper with Email 📧 (No Cookies) (dev_fusion/Linkedin-Profile-Scraper)

mapper.input:
Task
Generate a concise, personalized icebreaker from a LinkedIn “About” section. Output must be factual and based only on the provided text.

Input Provided {{6.about}}{{6.fullName}}


Instructions

Read only {{6.about}}

If it contains clear skills, achievements, or focus areas → base the icebreaker on those.

If it is empty, extremely short, or contains no meaningful info → do not offer to create an About section.
Create a simple field-aligned opener instead, e.g. “Hey, I appreciate the work you’re doing in your field.”

No guessing. No invented facts.

Max 25 words.

Output only the icebreaker line.

Examples
• “Noticed your background in supply-chain optimization and automation. Your shift toward data-driven processes stood out.”
• “Your mix of real-estate marketing and CRM implementation caught my attention, especially your focus on conversion improvement.”
• “Your work scaling SaaS partnerships is clear. The revenue-focused approach is strong.”
• Low-info example: “Hey, I appreciate the work you’re doing in your field and wanted to reach out.”
output only the icebreaker sentence

model.label: gpt-5-mini (system)A faster, cost-efficient version of GPT-5 for well-defined tasks

nested.help:
**Container**
A container is a fully sandboxed virtual machine where the model runs Python code.

**Expiration Time**
Containers expire if unused for 20 minutes. The expiration timer is reset after any operation on the container.
